chapter_goal: Make Fredholm finite-dimensional data visible for moduli regularity and orientation.

visuals.inspection_target: Index remains constant while defect spaces can move.
visuals.representation: rectangular SVD ledger plus stacked compact-estimate matrix
visuals.validation: rank-nullity, lower bound, perturbation index, composition additivity, dual relation

visuals.inspection_target: Each simple crossing flips orientation; two preserve it.
visuals.representation: index-zero diagonal paths crossing the noninvertible stratum

visuals.inspection_target: The zero set is tangent to the kernel and residuals contract.
visuals.representation: zero curve graphed over the kernel plus Newton-Picard corrections
visuals.validation: residual decrease, final residual, tangent slope at origin

visuals.inspection_target: Changing the obstruction level creates two, one singular, or no zeros.
visuals.representation: pseudoinverse splitting with scalar obstruction u^2-a
visuals.validation: TDT=T, DTD=D, kernel/cokernel dimensions, zero-count ledger

visuals.inspection_target: Critical values form a thin finite-dimensional set.
visuals.validation: sampled critical fraction and derivative ranks
